case_title: ANITA DAH VS. MARK E. SHOEMAKER

docket_entries.description: COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF DAH, ANITA

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF SEP-30-2010 IS OFF CALENDAR PER REQUEST OF THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR. PER THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR, JUDGMENT DEBTOR HAS NOT PAID HER THE AGRRED ON $100.00 PER MONTH.
